2603.08048.title: S2S-FDD: Bridging Industrial Time Series and Natural Language for Explainable Zero-shot Fault Diagnosis
2603.08048.paper_summary: Fault diagnosis is critical for the safe operation of industrial systems. Conventional diagnosis models typically produce abstract outputs such as anomaly scores or fault categories, failing to answer critical operational questions like "Why" or "How to repair". While large language models (LLMs) offer strong generalization and reasoning abilities, their training on discrete textual corpora creates a semantic gap when processing high-dimensional, temporal industrial signals. To address this challenge, we propose a Signals-to-Semantics fault diagnosis (S2S-FDD) framework that bridges high-dimensional sensor signals with natural language semantics through two key innovations: We first design a Signal-to-Semantic operator to convert abstract time-series signals into natural language summaries, capturing trends, periodicity, and deviations. Based on the descriptions, we design a multi-turn tree-structured diagnosis method to perform fault diagnosis by referencing historical maintenance documents and dynamically querying additional signals. The framework further supports human-in-the-loop feedback for continuous refinement. Experiments on the multiphase flow process show the feasibility and effectiveness of the proposed method for explainable zero-shot fault diagnosis.
2603.08048.paper_summary_zh: 故障診斷對於工業系統的安全運行至關重要。傳統的診斷模型通常產生抽象的輸出，例如異常分數或故障類別，無法回答關鍵的操作問題，如「為什麼」或「如何修復」。雖然大型語言模型（LLMs）提供了強大的泛化和推理能力，但它們在離散文本語料上的訓練在處理高維度、時間序列的工業信號時會產生語義差距。為了解決這一挑戰，我們提出了一個信號到語義故障診斷（S2S-FDD）框架，通過兩個關鍵創新將高維度傳感器信號與自然語言語義連接起來：我們首先設計了一個信號到語義運算符，將抽象的時間序列信號轉換為自然語言摘要，以捕捉趨勢、週期性和偏差。根據這些描述，我們設計了一種多輪樹狀結構的診斷方法，通過參考歷史維護文檔和動態查詢額外信號來進行故障診斷。該框架進一步支持人機協作的反饋，以便持續改進。在多相流過程中的實驗顯示，所提出的方法在可解釋的零樣本故障診斷方面的可行性和有效性。
2603.08048.author: Baoxue Li et.al.
